name: embercore
description: A TypeScript-powered automation core for ComputerCraft, compiled to Lua.
author: Nikkune

scripts.clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:scripts && npm run clean:manifests
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:scripts && npm run generate:manifests
scripts.prepare:release: npm run build && npm run build:scripts && npm run run:bump && npm run generate:manifests
